assertions.title: AI streaming response on plan request

steps.action: Type message: 'I'm at Santa Monica College transferring to UCLA for Computer Science'

steps.observed: Rate limit error returned before streaming could begin

evidence.consoleErrors: Rate limit error from OpenRouter API

assertions.issues: OpenRouter free tier rate limit exceeded. Cannot test streaming functionality. API returns 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' error.

assertions.title: Continued chat modifies existing plan

steps.observed: Could not generate initial plan due to rate limit
Test blocked - no initial plan to modify

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-CHAT-002 - cannot test plan modification without first generating a plan.

steps.action: Send message to trigger AI response

steps.observed: Red error toast displayed: 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' with Dismiss button

assertions.title: Empty or whitespace-only message is prevented

steps.action: Check send button with empty input

evidence.network: No API request made with empty input

steps.action: Test API endpoint directly with curl

assertions.title: Loading indicator shown while waiting for AI response

steps.observed: Loading indicator shown before error displayed

frictions.description: OpenRouter rate limits (20 req/min, 50 req/day) block AI-dependent assertions. Error occurs before streaming can be verified.

blockers.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit exceeded. API returns 429 'Rate limited' on all AI chat requests.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried requests multiple times, still hitting rate limit. Rate limits are account-level and cannot be bypassed.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 4 passed, 2 blocked by OpenRouter rate limits. VAL-CHAT-005, VAL-CHAT-004, VAL-CHAT-006, and VAL-CHAT-007 all pass. Error handling works gracefully for both rate limit (429) and server errors (500). Loading indicator is visible. Empty message prevention works. Streaming and plan modification cannot be tested due to rate limits.
